About: It is about general socio-political laws and patterns, ways, forms and methods of changing society along communist lines.
It is about the working-class struggle and the social revolution.
It is about the supposed laws behind the building of socialism and communism.
It is about the world revolutionary process as a whole.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the communist movements in the world.
ConsistsOf: It consists of the scientific socialism of Karl Marx and Friedrich Engels along with the theories of Vladimir Lenin and the CPSU.
CreatedTo: It was created to take over the sociological elements of the discipline of historical materialism.
HasA: It has the historical mission of the proletariat.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by being a science dealing with general socio-political laws and patterns.
It is characterized by being a science dealing with ways, forms and methods of changing society along communist lines.
It is characterized by being a science regarding the working-class struggle.
It is characterized by being a science regarding the social revolution.
It is characterized by being a science regarding the supposed laws behind the building of socialism and communism.
It is characterized by being a science regarding the world revolutionary process as a whole.
It is characterized by being the Marxist–Leninist school of sociology.
IsA: It is one of three major elements of Marxism–Leninism.
It is a science dealing with general socio-political laws and patterns, ways, forms and methods of changing society along communist lines.
It is a science regarding the working-class struggle.
It is a science regarding the social revolution.
It is a science regarding the supposed laws behind the building of socialism and communism.
It is a science regarding the world revolutionary process as a whole.
It is the Marxist–Leninist school of sociology.
It is an instrument for indoctrination.
KnownFor: It is known for its use in the Soviet education system.
It is known for being a necessary prerequisite for obtaining a postgraduate degree in a science in the USSR.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the Soviet Union.
It occurred in all institutions of higher education in the USSR.
UsedAs: It is used as an instrument for indoctrination.
It is used as a separate discipline in the Soviet education system.
It is used as a sociological element of the discipline of historical materialism.
UsedFor: It is used for forming the "correct", i.e. communist, worldview.
It is used for gaining objective knowledge.
It is used for investigation of laws, patterns, ways and forms of class struggle.
It is used for investigation of socialist revolution.
It is used for investigation of the development of socialism.
It is used for investigation of the construction of communism.
UsedIn: It is used in the Soviet education system.
It is used in all institutions of higher education in the USSR.
It is used in the corresponding research institutions and departments.
UsedTo: It is used to counter the "bourgeois pseudoscience" of sociology.
It is used to secure his position as "chief ideologist".
It is used to address the growing demand on the introduction of a discipline of sociology of Marxist–Leninist type.

About: それは、共産主義の路線に沿って社会を変革するための一般的な社会政治的法則、パターン、方法、形態、および方法を扱う科学についてです。
それは、労働者階級の闘争と社会革命についてです。
それは、社会主義と共産主義を建設するためのとされる法則についてです。
それは、世界的な革命プロセス全体についてです。

ConsistsOf: それは、カール・マルクスとフリードリヒ・エンゲルスの科学的社会主義と、ウラジーミル・レーニンおよびソ連共産党の理論から構成されています。
CreatedTo: それは、歴史的唯物論分野の社会学的要素を引き継ぐために作成されました。
HasA: それは、プロレタリアの歴史的使命を持っています。
HasFeatureOf: それは、一般的な社会政治的法則、パターン、方法、形態、および共産主義の路線に沿って社会を変革するための科学として特徴づけられます。
それは、労働者階級の闘争を扱う科学として特徴づけられます。
それは、社会革命を扱う科学として特徴づけられます。
それは、社会主義と共産主義を建設するためのとされる法則を扱う科学として特徴づけられます。
それは、世界的な革命プロセス全体を扱う科学として特徴づけられます。
それは、マルクス・レーニン主義社会学の学派として特徴づけられます。
それは、教化の手段として特徴づけられます。
